name: openspec-dashboard-axe-a11y
comment: Single source of truth for the NFR-9 axe-core ruleset. Pinned to WCAG 2.1 AA + WCAG 2.2 AA. The per-component a11y tests under tests/a11y load this file (tests/a11y/axe.ts) so the ruleset cannot drift from the spec. Target: WCAG 2.1 AA (all SC) + WCAG 2.2 AA (all 5 new SC: 2.4.11 Focus Not Obscured Min, 2.5.7 Dragging Movements, 2.5.8 Target Size Minimum, 3.3.7 Redundant Entry, 3.3.8 Accessible Auth Min).

scenarioPins.axeViolationFailsCI: Any axe violation returned against a rendered component fails the unit-test job and identifies the component + SC violated.
scenarioPins.dndManualATInPhase: Kanban DnD manual AT (NVDA/VoiceOver/JAWS) + keyboard-interaction scripts are recorded in docs/accessibility/dnd-manual-at.md in this phase, not deferred.
